'''zalafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oopsie|oopsie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oopsie|oopsie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zalafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zælæfæth|zælæfæth]] || [[word:zælæfæj|zælæfæj]] || [[word:zælæfæsh|zælæfæsh]] || [[word:zælæfæ|zælæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalalafath|zalalafath]] || [[word:zalalafaj|zalalafaj]] || [[word:zalalafash|zalalafash]] || [[word:zalalafa|zalalafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalafath|zalafath]] || [[word:zalafaj|zalafaj]] || [[word:zalafash|zalafash]] || [[word:zalafa|zalafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalaffath|zalaffath]] || [[word:zalaffaj|zalaffaj]] || [[word:zalaffash|zalaffash]] || [[word:zalaffaf|zalaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zalafatha|zalafatha]] || [[word:zalafaja|zalafaja]] || [[word:zalafasha|zalafasha]] || [[word:zalafaka|zalafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zalafath|zalafath]] || [[word:zalafaj|zalafaj]] || [[word:zalafash|zalafash]] || [[word:zalafa|zalafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zalafathal|zalafathal]] || [[word:zalafajal|zalafajal]] || [[word:zalafashal|zalafashal]] || [[word:zalafakal|zalafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zalafathatha|zalafathatha]] || [[word:zalafajaja|zalafajaja]] || [[word:zalafashasha|zalafashasha]] || [[word:zalafaka|zalafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zalafathan|zalafathan]] || [[word:zalafajan|zalafajan]] || [[word:zalafashan|zalafashan]] || [[word:zalafakan|zalafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zalafathaoro|zalafathaoro]] || [[word:zalafajaoro|zalafajaoro]] || [[word:zalafashaoro|zalafashaoro]] || [[word:zalafakaoro|zalafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
